infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: DiseaseX needs the camera so you can take photos of symptoms (e.g. eyes, urine colour) for the clinician to review.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: DiseaseX uses your photo library so you can attach existing symptom photos to an assessment.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: DiseaseX uses your location one time during onboarding to know if you are in a malaria-endemic country (per WHO). It is never tracked in the background.

plugins.cameraPermission: DiseaseX needs the camera so you can take photos of symptoms for the clinician to review.
plugins.photosPermission: DiseaseX uses your photo library so you can attach existing symptom photos to an assessment.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: DiseaseX uses your location once during onboarding to check if you are in a malaria-endemic country (per WHO).
